mnemonics: MOTHER: Maximum Optimization Through Heuristics, Efficient Reconstruction, Uncovering Transformations
NOISE: Non-Orthogonal Inverse Operations Used Successfully Everywhere
keyPoints: 5.1: Introduction to Image Degradation - explaining types of degradation (noise, blur, compression, etc.)
5.2: Image Restoration Techniques - discussing various methods (filtering, transform domain methods, etc.)
5.3: Blind Deconvolution - explaining the concept and its applications
5.4: Image Reconstruction - summarizing the process and its applications
